name: zsnd_tick
description: zSnd::Tick services the active backend, ticks fade processing, advances last-voice markers, dispatches marker callbacks, and clears or stops the last-voice state at terminal markers.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zSnd_Tick@4 at 0x49f620 still fails: 97 unmasked mismatches, 68 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 171 bytes, VC object symbol size 176 bytes.

Reviewed triage shows control-flow and call-shape drift across the backend service path, fade tick call, marker compare/dispatch, and last-voice stop/reset blocks; this remains functional-only until the zSound tick cluster receives a binary-safe pass.
